allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8888/.netlify/functions/captcha" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
